item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 152100Z AUTO 31005KT CAVOK 21/19 Q1018 NOSIG
🟡 TAF AMD LFOT 152019Z 1520/1618 VRB05KT CAVOK TEMPO 1520/1521 VRB15G25KT 4000 -SHRA BKN080CB PROB30 1602/1606 4000 BR TEMPO 1612/1618 VRB10G20KT FEW080CB PROB40 TEMPO 1612/1618 -TSRA SCT080CB PROB30 TEMPO 1612/1618 VRB15G30KT 3000 TSRAGR BKN070CB
